html:
Type 1Type 2Type 3

Broken Clockworks are naturally spawning Structures that appear in the Ruins. The player can use 3 Gears or Scraps to repair the Broken Clockworks and spawn a Damaged Clockworks that follows the player, or they can destroy it with a Hammer.

In either case, a pile will drop the following loot:

  • 1 Frazzled Wires, with a 55% chance to drop an additional one
  • A 25% chance to drop 1 Gear.
  • A 25% chance to drop 1 Melty Marbles
  • A chance to drop exactly 1 Gem (a 25% chance for a Red Gem and a 5% chance each for a Purple, Yellow, Orange, or Green Gem)
  • A 1% chance to drop 1 Thulecite

Repairing the Broken Clockworks will cause this loot table to roll twice in exchange for the 3 Gears or Scraps used to repair the Broken Clockworks; however, the second chance to drop Gears is 10% instead of 25%. Taking into account the Gear drops, the average cost to repair each pile of Broken Clockworks is 2.65 Gears.

When hammered, there also exists a 10% chance of spawning a hostile Damaged Knight, Rook, or Bishop.

There are three different types of Broken Clockworks which spawn different types of clockworks with different probabilities, as indicated by the table below.

Type
Type 1 50% 50% 0%
Type 2 70% 0% 30%
Type 3 0% 70% 30%

Year of the Clockwork Knight

During Year of the Clockwork Knight, hammering type 1 and type 2 Broken Clockworks have chance to drop a small Clockwork Knight's Red Pouch as well as their regular loot. Type 1 has 66% chance and type 2 has 100% chance.

Trivia

  • Each type of Broken Clockworks is made up of jumbled-up parts of the chess pieces that type can spawn:
    • Type 1 contains a Bishop's robe and head, and a Knight's head and torso.
    • Type 2 contains a Rook's lower jaw and horn, and a Knight's head.
    • Type 3 contains a Bishop's robe and head, and a Rook's horn and leg.
  • In the singleplayer version, game code actually conditions the Thulecite loot on location - it's only dropped in Ruins.

Bugs

  • Allied chess pieces spawned from Broken Clockworks are hostile towards Hutch and other players.

Gallery

  • Broken Clockworks on the map.
  • Repaired Clockworks of each type.
  • A pile of Broken Clockworks, as seen in A Moderately Friendly Update trailer.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các Máy Đồng hồ Hỏng là các Cấu trúc sinh ra một cách tự nhiên xuất hiện trong Tàn Tích. Người chơi có thể sử dụng 3 Bánh răng hoặc Phế liệu để sửa chữa các Đồng hồ bị hỏng và tạo ra các Đồng hồ bị hư hỏng theo sau người chơi hoặc họ có thể phá hủy nó bằng Búa.

'''Broken Clockworks''' are [[:Category:Naturally Spawning Objects|naturally spawning]] [[Structures]] that appear in the [[Ruins]]. The player can use 3 [[Gears]] or [[Scrap]]s to repair the Broken Clockworks and spawn a Damaged Clockworks that follows the player, or they can destroy it with a [[Hammer]].

In either case, a pile will drop the following loot:
* 1 [[Frazzled Wires]], with a 55% chance to drop an additional one
* A 25% chance to drop 1 [[Gears/DST|Gear]]. 
* A 25% chance to drop 1 [[Melty Marbles/DST|Melty Marbles]]
* A chance to drop exactly 1 [[Gems|Gem]] (a 25% chance for a [[Red Gem/DST|Red Gem]] and a 5% chance each for a [[Purple Gem/DST|Purple]], [[Yellow Gem/DST|Yellow]], [[Orange Gem/DST|Orange]], or [[Green Gem/DST|Green Gem]])
* A 1% chance to drop 1 [[Thulecite]]

Repairing the Broken Clockworks will cause this loot table to roll twice in exchange for the 3 Gears or Scraps used to repair the Broken Clockworks; however, the second chance to drop Gears is 10% instead of 25%. Taking into account the Gear drops, the average cost to repair each pile of Broken Clockworks is 2.65 Gears.

When hammered, there also exists a 10% chance of spawning a hostile [[Damaged Knight/DST|Damaged Knight]], [[Damaged Rook/DST|Rook]], or [[Damaged Bishop/DST|Bishop]].

There are three different types of Broken Clockworks which spawn different types of clockworks with different probabilities, as indicated by the table below.

== {{Pic32|Clockwork Knight Shrine}} Year of the Clockwork Knight == 
During [[Year of the Clockwork Knight]], hammering type 1 and type 2 Broken Clockworks have chance to drop a small Clockwork Knight's [[Red Pouch]] as well as their regular loot. Type 1 has 66% chance and type 2 has 100% chance.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
*Each type of Broken Clockworks is made up of jumbled-up parts of the chess pieces that type can spawn:
**Type 1 contains a Bishop's robe and head, and a Knight's head and torso.
**Type 2 contains a Rook's lower jaw and horn, and a Knight's head.
**Type 3 contains a Bishop's robe and head, and a Rook's horn and leg.
*In the singleplayer version, game code actually conditions the [[Thulecite]] loot on location - it's only dropped in [[Ruins]].

=={{pic|32|Mosquito}} Bugs== 
*Allied chess pieces spawned from Broken Clockworks are hostile towards [[Hutch]] and other players.
